fileSummary: This comprehensive collection of files constitutes a major part of the RPGlitch codebase, spanning core game engine logic, data management, AI intelligence for prompt generation and context, an extensive Svelte-based user interface, various utility functions, automated agent skills, and project configuration/documentation, all reflecting a reactive, local-first monolith architecture.

functionSummaries.Core Logic Functions: The codebase features functions for managing reactive Svelte stores, handling database interactions and data normalization, generating and parsing AI prompts, orchestrating game state transitions, and performing various UI manipulations and utility operations.

classSummaries.Conceptual Classes and Modules: While explicit ES6 classes are less common due to the Svelte and functional paradigms, the architecture employs module-based organization that conceptually acts like classes for managing distinct domains such as data repositories, AI context, and specific UI components.

languageNotes: The project extensively uses JavaScript with Svelte for front-end reactivity and component-based UI development, alongside a robust testing setup, diverse configuration formats (JSON, YAML), and comprehensive Markdown documentation, indicating a mature and well-structured development environment.
